overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a post-apocalyptic waterfront environment with massive overgrown skyscraper ruins. The character transitions from wading in shallow water to walking on sandy beaches and finally swimming toward sunset-lit ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water at base of massive overgrown skyscraper ruin

events.description: character finishes panning camera upward and begins walking forward through shallow water

agents.ego_description: standing in shallow water looking up at the massive overgrown tower, then beginning to walk forward while panning the camera

entered.detail: massive cylindrical tower covered in greenery with exposed glass windows and metal framework
clear shallow water reaching up to the character's knees with visible sandy bottom
dense tropical foliage and palm trees covering the landscape

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic view looking up at a massive overgrown skyscraper ruin. The character stands in shallow water, panning the camera to take in the scale of the structure before beginning to walk forward through the water toward the shore.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy shoreline transition between water and beach

events.description: character exits shallow water and steps onto sandy shore

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water and emerging onto a sandy beach area, moving toward wooden ruins

entered.detail: sandy beach area with patches of wet sand and small puddles
large collapsed wooden framework structure partially overgrown with vegetation
scattered palm trees lining the edge of the beach

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water to land, walking onto a sandy shore with scattered palm trees. The massive tower from the previous segment remains visible to the left while a large wooden ruin structure comes into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with scattered ruins and rock formations

events.description: character approaches and passes by the large wooden ruin structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across sandy and rocky terrain toward a distinctive stone arch formation

entered.detail: natural rock formation with a distinctive archway shape
tall thin metal framework tower visible in the distant background
mixed sand and rocky ground with scattered boulders

segments.scene_description: The character traverses open sandy terrain dotted with ruins, passing a large wooden structure and approaching a stone arch formation. The environment opens up to reveal distant structures including a tall metal tower on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water surrounded by overgrown ruins at sunset

events.description: dramatic shift to golden hour lighting as sun becomes visible through clouds, casting warm orange and pink hues
character dives into deeper water and begins swimming forward

agents.ego_description: swimming through open water toward distant ruins illuminated by the setting sun, with only the head and bow visible above water

entered.detail: dramatic sunset sky with golden sun rays breaking through clouds, creating a warm orange and purple atmosphere
bright golden reflection of the sun shimmering on the water surface

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a breathtaking golden hour as the character enters deep water and begins swimming. The sun casts dramatic rays through the clouds, reflecting off the water surface, while distant ruins and the metal tower are silhouetted against the warm sunset sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the base of a colossal overgrown skyscraper through a coastal ruin and into a shimmering sunset sea. It begins with a dramatic upward gaze at the massive tower while the character wades through shallow water toward the shore. As the character transitions onto land, the camera pans across a sandy beach dotted with palm trees and wooden ruins, moving past a stone arch toward a distant metal tower on the horizon. The scene then shifts into a breathtaking golden hour as the character enters deep water to swim, with the lighting transforming into warm, dramatic rays. Finally, the camera glides across the reflective water surface toward the silhouetted ruins of the city under a glowing sunset sky.
